text:
Every morning Charlie wakes early to listen to bird songs. One song in particular loves him. It sings "Old MacDonald had a farm...". On his farm he raises a unique little bird. The bird thinks it's human.

One day, Charlie feels terribly sad. He decides to take a walk.

At dawn the bird sings. Well, sings.

"I think," says the bird, "perhaps you'd like my life."

Charlie thinks a lot about that.

He learns to fly.

He learns to speak.

He climbs trees.

He learns to sing.

Then he sings--

Oh oh oh oh owls.

He's happy again.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
